title: prunus × maureri
intro: Prunus × maureri, also known as cherry plum, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between Prunus cerasifera and Prunus pseudocerasus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems due to its high levels of flavonoids and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Prunus × maureri include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of cherry plum include infusions, tinctures, and syrups that can be used to make teas, capsules, and other medicinal products.
